name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — how did we do?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks so much for coming in to see us at Bright Smile Dental. We know the dentist isn't everyone's favourite errand, so it really does mean a lot that you trusted us with your smile.

If you have 30 seconds, we'd be grateful if you shared a quick review — it genuinely helps other nervous patients find a clinic they can feel comfortable with:

https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if anything about your visit didn't feel right, please just hit reply and tell us directly — no pressure, no script, we'd rather hear it from you first so we can make it better.

Thanks again,
The team at Bright Smile Dental

Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick nudge in case our email got buried. If you have a sec, a short review would really help us out: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review Thank you!

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
